name: Creamy Cocoa Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Amari Whole Wheat Pastry Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients to form a crumb mixture. Set aside.
- If the crumb mixture does not stick together, add a small amount of oil.
2. Beat together the remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. Place half of the crumb mixture in an oiled 9-inch x 12-inch pan and press down firmly.
4. Cover with the cocoa mixture.
5. Top with the remaining crumb mixture.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Allow to cool completely, then cut into squares.
